summary: Configure when disk and memory alerts fire — by percentage or free space amount — with per-drive controls in a new Notifications settings tab.
introduced: Notifications settings — new Settings tab to enable alerts and set disk and memory thresholds
Per-drive thresholds — customize or disable low-space alerts for each mounted storage volume individually
changed: Disk space alerts — fire at your chosen free-space percentage or GB amount instead of a fixed 10% / 100 GB rule
Memory usage alerts — fire when memory used or free RAM crosses your threshold instead of a generic poor health score
